  As set out in the data importer's Corporate Privacy Policy:  
https://www.spglobal.com/en/privacy/privacy -policy- english#data -retention  
  
Appendix 3 - Security Measures   
 
 1. All parties are obliged to clarify the organizational, administrative, tech
evidence.clean_text: All parties are obliged to clarify the organizational, administrative, technical, and security measures that will be applied to the transferred Personal Data to fulfill the provisions of Article (19) of the Law and Article (23) of the Implementing Regulation of the Law.
